project_type: Book translation project - PDF generation with embedded images from source PDF
build_system: pip (PyMuPDF/fitz for image extraction, fpdf2 for PDF generation)
test_framework: Manual verification - checking generated PDF has correct images at correct positions
test_command: python3 -c "import fitz; doc=fitz.open(\"Shaxmat - bolalar o'yini (O'zbek tilida tarjima).pdf\"); print(f'Pages: {len(doc)}'); imgs=[i for p in range(len(doc)) for i in doc[p].get_images()]; print(f'Images: {len(imgs)}')"
verification_instructions: 1. Run the PDF generation script. 2. Verify the output PDF has ~256 chess diagram images embedded. 3. Verify full-page chapter dividers appear. 4. Check file size is significantly larger than the text-only version (should be >5MB with images).
snapshot_or_generated_files: The final PDF: 'Shaxmat - bolalar o'yini (O'zbek tilida tarjima).pdf' and extracted images in 'extracted_images/' directory
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11. PyMuPDF (fitz) and fpdf2 already installed.
contribution_requirements: All 256 chess diagrams from the English PDF must be extracted and placed at corresponding [Diagramma X.Y] positions in the Uzbek PDF. Full-page chapter dividers should also be included.
key_patterns: The English PDF (288 pages) contains: 256 chess diagram images (small ~392-458px square and wide ~826x478px), 26 full-page chapter divider diagrams (~978x1280px), 15 chapter opener icons (~188x196px), 56 decorative/notation blocks (~862x118px). The Uzbek text in chapters_uz/ has exactly 256 [Diagramma X.Y] placeholders matching the chess diagrams. Chapter page ranges in the English PDF are defined by full-page divider positions. The existing generate_pdf.py uses fpdf2 with DejaVu fonts and treats diagram placeholders as styled text boxes.
relevant_files: /projects/sandbox/gg/Chess Is Childs Play Teaching Techniques That Work (Laura Sherman, Bill Kilpatrick) (z-library.sk, 1lib.sk, z-lib.sk).pdf
directory_structure: /projects/sandbox/gg/ - root with English PDF, Uzbek PDF, generate_pdf.py, chapters_uz/ (translated text), chapters_en/ (English text), fonts/ (DejaVu TTF files). Branch: feat/uzbek-translation

english_pdf_structure.diagram_extraction_strategy: For each chapter N, scan pages in chapter_ranges_0indexed[N] in page order. Collect images where (380<=w<=470 and 380<=h<=470) OR (800<=w<=870 and 350<=h<=500). These are chess diagrams numbered sequentially as N.1, N.2, N.3... matching [Diagramma N.Y] placeholders in chapters_uz/
